controls: This pass verifies public contact routes only.
No IFS portal field was changed.
No partner invite, upload, award terms acceptance or final submission was performed.
Verified contact routes do not prove partner commitment, budget, permits, export-control position, farmer lead, academic lead, maritime lead, hardware access or public-sector lead eligibility.
Each external dispatch still requires exact action-time approval for the destination, queue item and payload hash.
next_actions: Use verified contact-route evidence to prioritise external evidence acquisition when exact action-time approval exists.
Replace or supplement the QUB KTP email payload with the official QUB KTP Contact Us form unless ktp@qub.ac.uk is independently verified.
For UK-Switzerland contact-route payloads, decide whether to use public forms or populate verified public emails for Kandou, Sensirion and SwissChips before any send.
Rerun route-unlock evidence audit after any partner reply, support letter, budget, permit/export determination or lead confirmation arrives.
